problem id: b6cd1807
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  11000000 -> 11111111
  11110010 -> 11101111
  01100011 -> 00100111
  01001010 -> 00101111
  11010010 -> 11101111
  11111101 -> 01010111
  11110101 -> 00010111
  11000110 -> 01001111

query: 10100110
predicted answer: 01001111
